claim_boundary: Public-safe care contract/evidence for instant Live Surface reactions and Next-Step Care; no public repo Telegram sends

next_step_care_contract.accessibility_note: Care infrastructure for neurodivergent users; not cosmetic polish
next_step_care_contract.before_action_example: I’m going to react with ❤️ to your latest Telegram message.
next_step_care_contract.fail_closed_example: I can’t safely find the last message id, so I won’t guess.
next_step_care_contract.name: Next-Step Care
next_step_care_contract.purpose: tiny predictable narration that reduces uncertainty before side effects

not_claimed: The public repository sends Telegram reactions itself
The public repository exports raw Telegram message IDs or chat IDs
The public repository ships the private Hermes runtime adapter
An agent should search tools or private databases to react to a warmed-context message
release_principle: Live Surface reduces uncertainty before it reduces task time

sprint_plan.done_when: reaction intent resolves from host envelope with 0 tool calls and no DB archaeology
sprint_plan.name: Instant reaction primitive

sprint_plan.done_when: before/action/after/fail-closed microcopy is part of the action plan contract
sprint_plan.name: Next-Step Care narration

sprint_plan.done_when: release artifacts document the contract while keeping private runtime state out
sprint_plan.name: Public release evidence
